texto: Like stones words are laborious and unforgiving and the fitting of them together like the fitting of stones demands great patience and strength of purpose and particular skill.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Edmund Morrison: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Like stones words are laborious and unforgiving and the fitting of them together like the fitting…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, words, language pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de language.
